children.name: rabbit-feature-scope
children.description: shared skill for resolving natural-language requests to affected rabbit features

children.name: rabbit-spec
children.description: spec-authoring skill that judges open vs specific requests and writes impl-suggestion files

children.name: rabbit-file
children.description: unified bug and backlog filing/tracking on the bug-backlog-files branch

children.name: rabbit-feature
children.description: owns rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill; invokes tdd-subagent scripts

nodes.name: skills
nodes.description: skill library (copied from feature sources via build-contract.json)

nodes.name: hooks
nodes.description: hook scripts (copied from rabbit-cage via build-contract.json)

nodes.name: commands
nodes.description: slash commands (copied from feature sources via build-contract.json)

nodes.name: bugs
nodes.description: centralized bug tracker (created on first bug filing)

nodes.name: backlogs
nodes.description: centralized backlog tracker (created on first backlog filing)
